item.title: Draeger, Inc.: Atlan A350XL. Model Number: 8621600. anesthesia workstation Recall
item.product: Atlan A350XL. Model Number: 8621600. anesthesia workstation
item.summary: The Atlan anesthesia workstation either indicated a failure of the piston ventilator before use or suffered a failure of the mechanical ventilation during use. Product details: Atlan A350XL. Model Number: 8621600. anesthesia workstation
